value.stringValue:
AND(
ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ),
OR( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'EMEA Strategic - Sales' ), ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'NA Strategic - Sales' ) ),
[Opportunity].ARR__c >= 45000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )) , [Opportunity].Have_SE__c =false )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_1
formulas.expression:
AND(
ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.StageName}),
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Type} , 'New Sale' ),
OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'EMEA Strategic - Sales' ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'NA Strategic - Sales' ) ),
{!myVariable_current.ARR__c} >= 45000, {!myVariable_current.Probability} >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Investors' )) , {!myVariable_current.Have_SE__c} =false )

value.stringValue:
AND(
ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'Agencies Strategic - Sales' ), [Opportunity].ARR__c >= 30000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )) , [Opportunity].Have_SE__c =false
)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_10
formulas.expression:

)

)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_10_pmetrule
formulas.expression:

ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.StageName}),

ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'Agencies Strategic - Sales' ), {!myVariable_old.ARR__c} >= 30000, {!myVariable_old.Probability} >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Investors' )) , {!myVariable_old.Have_SE__c} =false
)

value.stringValue: AND( ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName), OR( CONTAINS( TEXT([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c), "Japan") , CONTAINS( TEXT([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c), "Japan - CSM") ), NOT(ISBLANK([Opportunity].Owner.UserRoleId )), NOT(CONTAINS([Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.Name , 'Gaprise')), [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, [Opportunity].ARR__c >= 25000, [Opportunity].Have_SE__c = False, ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_19
formulas.expression: AND( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.StageName}), OR( CONTAINS( TEXT({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}), "Japan") , CONTAINS( TEXT({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}), "Japan - CSM") ), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRoleId} )), NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Owner.UserRole.Name} , 'Gaprise')), {!myVariable_current.Probability} >= 0.25, {!myVariable_current.ARR__c} >= 25000, {!myVariable_current.Have_SE__c} = False, ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Type} , 'New Sale' ) )

value.stringValue: AND( ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName), OR( CONTAINS( TEXT([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c), "Japan") , CONTAINS( TEXT([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c), "Japan - CSM") ), NOT(ISBLANK([Opportunity].Owner.UserRoleId )), NOT(CONTAINS([Opportunity].Owner.UserRole.Name , 'Gaprise')), [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, [Opportunity].ARR__c >= 25000, [Opportunity].Have_SE__c = False, ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_19_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.StageName}), OR( CONTAINS( TEXT({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c}), "Japan") , CONTAINS( TEXT({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c}), "Japan - CSM") ), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRoleId} )), NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_old.Owner.UserRole.Name} , 'Gaprise')), {!myVariable_old.Probability} >= 0.25, {!myVariable_old.ARR__c} >= 25000, {!myVariable_old.Have_SE__c} = False, ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Type} , 'New Sale' ) )

value.stringValue:
AND(
ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),
OR( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'APAC ANZ - CSM' ), ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'APAC ANZ - Sales' ) ),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ),
[Opportunity].ARR__c >= 35000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )) ,
[Opportunity].Have_SE__c = FALSE)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_24
formulas.expression:
AND(
ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.StageName}),
OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'APAC ANZ - CSM' ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'APAC ANZ - Sales' ) ),
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Type} , 'New Sale' ),
{!myVariable_current.ARR__c} >= 35000, {!myVariable_current.Probability} >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Investors' )) ,
{!myVariable_current.Have_SE__c} = FALSE)

ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),

ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ),

formulas.expression:

OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'APAC ANZ - CSM' ), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'APAC ANZ - Sales' ) ),

{!myVariable_old.Have_SE__c} = FALSE)

value.stringValue:
AND(
ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),
OR( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'Channel Sales' ), CONTAINS( $Label.Opportunity_Division_Reseller, TEXT([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c)) ),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ),
[Opportunity].ARR__c >= 30000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )) ,
[Opportunity].Have_SE__c = FALSE)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_27
formulas.expression:
AND(
ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.StageName}),
OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'Channel Sales' ), CONTAINS( {!$Label.Opportunity_Division_Reseller}, TEXT({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c})) ),
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Type} , 'New Sale' ),
{!myVariable_current.ARR__c} >= 30000, {!myVariable_current.Probability} >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Investors' )) ,
{!myVariable_current.Have_SE__c} = FALSE)

value.stringValue:
AND(
ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),
OR( ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'Channel Sales' ), CONTAINS( $Label.Opportunity_Division_Reseller, TEXT([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c)) ),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ),
[Opportunity].ARR__c >= 30000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )) ,
[Opportunity].Have_SE__c = FALSE)

formulas.expression:
AND(
ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.StageName}),
OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'Channel Sales' ), CONTAINS( {!$Label.Opportunity_Division_Reseller}, TEXT({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c})) ),
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Type} , 'New Sale' ),
{!myVariable_old.ARR__c} >= 30000, {!myVariable_old.Probability} >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Investors' )) ,
{!myVariable_old.Have_SE__c} = FALSE)

[Opportunity].ARR__c >= 40000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )) , [Opportunity].Have_SE__c =False )

ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'EMEA Inside Sales - Sales'), [Opportunity].ARR__c >= 35000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )),

formulas.expression:

ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'EMEA Inside Sales - Sales'), {!myVariable_current.ARR__c} >= 35000, {!myVariable_current.Probability} >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_current.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Investors' )),

ISCHANGED([Opportunity].StageName),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Opportunity_Division__c, 'EMEA Inside Sales - Sales'), [Opportunity].ARR__c >= 35000, [Opportunity].Probability >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( [Opportunity].Primary_Solution__c , 'Investors' )),
ISPICKVAL([Opportunity].Type , 'New Sale' ),
[Opportunity].Have_SE__c =False

formulas.name: formula_myRule_7_pmetrule
formulas.expression:
AND(
ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.StageName}),
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Opportunity_Division__c}, 'EMEA Inside Sales - Sales'), {!myVariable_old.ARR__c} >= 35000, {!myVariable_old.Probability} >= 0.25, NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Sales' )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( {!myVariable_old.Primary_Solution__c} , 'Investors' )),
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Type} , 'New Sale' ),
{!myVariable_old.Have_SE__c} =False
)

value.stringValue: Aaron Friedman - Solution Engineering Team Manager
Emilie Rochedy - Solution Engineering and Implementation Services Team Manager - EMEA
